data.general: You may feel emotional and sensitive today, especially when it comes to your finances and relationships. With the Sun in the 2nd house, you may need to be more cautious with your spending. Try to focus on long-term goals rather than short-term gains.
data.luck: Your luck may be influenced by the Moon's presence in the 5th house, which can bring unexpected opportunities or surprises. However, with Mars in the 12th house, you may need to be patient and wait for the right moment to take action.
data.scope: With Jupiter in the 2nd house, your scope for growth and expansion may be related to your personal finances or values. You may be able to invest in something that will benefit you in the long run.
data.study: You may feel a strong desire to learn or explore new ideas, especially related to communication or self-expression. With Mercury in the 1st house, you may be more inclined to take on new challenges or pursue creative pursuits.
data.love: With Venus in the 3rd house, you may be more focused on friendships or sibling relationships than romantic relationships. However, this can also be a great time to nurture your existing relationships or form new connections.
data.travel: You may be feeling restless or eager to explore new places, especially related to your work or career. With Rahu in the 9th house, you may have the opportunity to travel or take on new responsibilities that will broaden your horizons.
